title: Canonical invocation delivery
summary: The supervisor MUST validate and deliver each canonical invocation card without contract-shadowing rewrites.
instructions: Before delegation, the supervisor MUST use the harness-produced invocation validation artifact and MUST NOT delegate a card whose validation status is failed or missing.
For a named worker stage, the supervisor MUST paste the full canonical invocation Markdown verbatim into the subagent prompt; a path-only reference or summary MUST NOT substitute for the card.
The supervisor MUST persist the exact delegated prompt body to the matching `.delegation.md` artifact before stage submission so the harness can validate delivery.
The supervisor MUST NOT append parallel scope, policy, gate, or plan restatements that could shadow the canonical card; a minimal non-conflicting persona label MAY precede it.
A missing or mismatched delegation artifact MUST be repaired against the same active invocation rather than bypassed or represented as successful delivery.
